subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Lord! I humble myself before the Lote-Tree of Thy Divinity, the Throne of Thy Sovereign Lordship, and the Seat of Thy All-Merciful Dominion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مولای مولای انی اتذلل الی سدره الوهیتک و سریر سلطنه ربوبیتک و عرش رحمانیتک ان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for protection
